title: Starkiller (disambiguation)
content:
'''Starkiller''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Ilum]], a planet turned into a mobile [[planet]]ary [[superweapon]] known used by the [[First Order]], first seen in the [[2015]] film [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']]
**'''[[Starkiller Base]]''', a series of bases on the planet Ilum 
***Its [[Command center (Starkiller Base)|command center]]
***The '''[[Starkiller aerial defense force]]''', a unit of [[First Order TIE fighter pilot|First Order TIE Fighter Pilots]] tasked with the protection of Starkiller Base
**The '''[[Starkiller crisis]]'''
**The '''[[Starkiller Base system|star system]]''' in which Starkiller Base was [[Battle of Starkiller Base|destroyed]]
**The '''[[Unidentified star (Starkiller Base)|star]]''' of the aforementioned system, which was drained by the Starkiller Base superweapon in order to attack the [[Resistance base]] on the planet [[D'Qar]]
*'''[[Luke Skywalker]]''', a [[Jedi Master]] whose name in early drafts of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] was "'''Luke Starkiller'''"

===Non-canon===
*'''[[Luke Starkiller]]''', a [[human]] [[Jedi]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Banol Starkiller]]''', a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] operating on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]
*'''[[O'frin Starkiller]]''', a human male pilot individual who piloted a starship during the time of the Galactic Civil War.
*'''[[Pashna Starkiller]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Alliance Military/Legends|Military]]
*'''[[Pashna Starkiller (Mon Calamari)|Pashna Starkiller]]''', a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] officer in the Alliance to Restore the Republic's Military
*'''[[Windy Starkiller]]''', a childhood friend of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
**Windy's '''[[Windy Starkiller's father|father]]'''
**Windy's '''[[Windy Starkiller's mother|mother]]'''
*'''[[Gorse Bendak]]''', known by the nickname "'''Bendak Starkiller'''," a [[Dueling|duelist]] in the [[Taris dueling ring]]
*'''[[Galen Marek]]''', codenamed "'''Starkiller'''," a secret [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]
**'''[[Subject 1138]]''', also known as "'''Starkiller'''," a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of Marek
***A pair of '''[[Starkiller's lightsabers|lightsabers]]''' used by Subject 1138
**'''[[Dark Apprentice]]''', also known as "'''Starkiller'''," another clone of Marek
**'''[[Starkiller's Trial of Skill]]''', Marek's first mission to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]
**'''[[Starkiller's Trial of Insight]]''', Marek's second mission to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Temple
**'''[[Starkiller's Trial of the Spirit]]''', Marek's third and final mission to the Jedi Temple
*'''[[Jimm Doshun]]''', a resident of the planet [[Aduba-3/Legends|Aduba-3]] who called himself "'''The Starkiller Kid'''"
*'''[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]''', a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] whose name in early drafts of ''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'' was "'''Luke Starkiller'''"

===Starships===
*The '''''[[Starkiller]]''''', a [[Frommon longhaul all-purpose transport]] used by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Leshy Drobo]]
*The '''''[[Shadowblade]]''''', code-named "'''Starkiller'''," a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]

===Non-canon===
*'''[[Kane Starkiller]]''', a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who first appeared in early drafts of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] and later appeared in ''[[The Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]]
**'''[[Annikin Starkiller]]''', son of Kane
**'''[[Deak Starkiller]]''', another son of Kane

==Real world==
===Early drafts===
*'''''[[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars]]'''''
*'''''[[The Star Wars: From The Adventures of Luke Starkiller]]'''''

===Canon===
*"'''[[Captain Phasma's Escape from Starkiller Base]]'''"
*'''[[Join the Resistance: Attack on Starkiller Base]]'''
*"'''[[Star Wars Inside Intel: Starkiller Base|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Starkiller Base]]'''"
*"'''[[The Search for Skywalker and the Battle of Starkiller Base]]'''"

===Individuals===
*'''[[Master Starkeiller]]'''

==See also==
*'''[[Relgon Starkill]]''', a Human male from the game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]''
